grantor_name: Jane A. Loe and Dana F. Doe

legal_description: A certain lot or parcel of land with the buildings thereon at 3 Quinn W. Roe, Kittery, County of York and State of Maine, being the premises conveyed to the Mortgagor by deed recorded in the York County Registry of Deeds in Book 1600, Page 17.
